description: Wave 1: Create reusable hydrateProject() helper and apply it to switchProject, cycleToProject, deleteProject switch path, and exportSingleProject to fix non-active project data loading.
steps: In src/persistenceService.js: Add hydrateProject(projectId) function that reads project metadata, loads all workspaces from localStorage (with Firestore fallback), loads tasks/taskGroups, and returns a fully assembled project object.
In src/App.jsx: Import hydrateProject from persistenceService.
In src/App.jsx: Refactor switchProject() to use hydrateProject() for loading the target project's workspaces and tasks instead of relying on in-memory target.workspaces.
In src/App.jsx: Refactor cycleToProject() to use hydrateProject() and also set tasks/taskGroups (currently missing).
In src/App.jsx: Refactor deleteProject() switch-to-next path to use hydrateProject() instead of next.workspaces || defaultWorkspaces.
In src/App.jsx: Refactor exportSingleProject() to hydrate the project from storage before exporting, ensuring complete workspace and task data.
acceptance_criteria: A reusable hydrateProject(projectId) function exists in persistenceService.js
hydrateProject reads metadata, loads all workspace data, loads tasks/taskGroups, returns a complete project
switchProject uses hydrateProject for target project data
cycleToProject uses hydrateProject for target project data and sets tasks/taskGroups
deleteProject switch path uses hydrateProject for next project data
exportSingleProject uses hydrateProject to get complete project data for export
npm run build exits with code 0
verification: Run npm run build in /projects/sandbox/ClearMind and confirm exit code 0
